title: Ubiquiti Pro XG Aggregation switch
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / UniFi Switches
description: The USW-Pro-XG-Aggregation is a fully managed L3 switch in a 19" rackmount chassis featuring 32Ã SFP28 ports (supporting 1 G / 10 G / 25 Gbps) with the Etherlighting function, allowing you to illuminate ports in different colors to indicate port location, speed/link status, and native VLAN/network. It is equipped with a 1.3" touchscreen display capable of showing individual port statistics, error states, network load, and other information. The USW-Pro-XG-Aggregation is managed via the UniFi… (32) 1G / 10G / 25Gbps (SFP28) Etherlighting â illuminated port status indicators 1.6 Tbps switching capacity Touchscreen display Redundant power via SmartPower RPS connector Management through UniFi Network server The USW-Pro-XG-Aggregation does not have a web interface; it is centrally managed via the UniFi Network server with support for the UniFi mobile app. It offers an extensive set of advanced L2 switching protocols and features, including per-port operating modes (switching, mirroring, or aggregation). The UniFi Network server and mobile app allow administrators to configure and monitor virtually all switch functions through a graphical user interface from anywhere This generation of switches supports redundant power through a dedicated connector to the UniFi SmartPower unit in case the switchâs primary power source fails Device Power cable 19" rackmount brackets
